content: SCX API surface hardening wave 2026-07-07b: folded user-pasted SCX text/speech guide captures into UpstreamDocumentation/attachments, regenerated mined OpenAPI candidate as 3.1.1, enriched OpenAI compatibility notes, unsupported OpenAI params, SCX top_k, current scx-tts speech shape, voice enrollment/cloning fields, audio formats, response limits, and server tool enum. Added tests/Test-KritScxLiveSurface.mjs for offline spec validation and bounded live probes. Live probe with HKCU SCX_API_KEY: /models pass count 12, /batches pass empty list, /vector-stores pass empty list; /chat/completions, /responses, /embeddings reachable but quota-blocked by 429 Daily token limit exceeded. Split offline and live receipts into scx-spec-validate.latest.json and scx-live-smoke.latest.json. Fixed VS Code file/folder attach dialog defaultUri fallback for no-workspace windows, kept Repo attach workspace-gated with clear error, and clamped SCX temperature send path/UI to 0..1. Added docs/SCX-API-SURFACE-MATRIX-2026-07-07.md. Lens ingest wave .scx-docs-20260707b stored 97 files / 5,700,673 bytes and regenerated 97/97 byte-identical from SQL. Verification passed: node tests 19/19, npm build, PS parse, py_compile, store_verify 590/590.

content: MCP and mux hardening wave 2026-07-07d: inspected ~/.codex/config.toml and local MCP scripts. Found bc_al args stored as one space-containing arg; repaired config with timestamp backups so args are [launchmcpserver,--transport,stdio], marked shopify-dev-mcp enabled, added kritical-scxcode MCP using codex-wrapper/Start-KritScxMcpServer.ps1 to read SCX_API_KEY from HKCU at runtime without embedding secrets in config. Verified config parses with tomllib: servers bc_al, falcon-mcp, kritical-scxcode, kritical-store, node_repl, pax8, shopify-dev-mcp; kritical-scxcode has no env secret. Patched mcp-server/server.mjs to send Bearer plus x-api-key SCX auth. Added MCP protocol tests for kritical-scxcode and kritical-store. Store MCP list/tools and store_stats returned live SQL counts; SCX MCP list/models works, generation remains quota-blocked by 429. Fixed mux/Invoke-KritScxSyntheticContext.py lens worker argument-order bug so it passes model to scx(). Verification passed: node tests 48/48, mux matrix unittest 13/13, npm build, py_compile, config parse, launcher smoke, store_verify 590/590.
